Approved Campaign Messaging (verbatim framework)
YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.rule_text: The approved campaign headline must appear verbatim: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can: Increase your muscle strength / Improve your skin symptoms / Rely less on steroids / Do more of the activities you love

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:
Increase your muscle strength
Improve your skin symptoms
Rely less on steroids
Do more of the activities you love

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:

rules.intent: Preserve MLR-approved benefit claims and bullet framing.
rules.rule_text: Product benefits copy must use the approved framework verbatim: "LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:" followed by bullets: Increase your muscle strength / Improve your skin symptoms / Rely less on steroids / Do more of the activities you love.

effect.content: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.
LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.
turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.

governance.preferred_form: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

rules.rule_text: Mechanism-of-action messaging must use the approved primary statement verbatim ("Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.") or the approved alternate ("...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.").

effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.
